passages.passage_text:
Directions (Q. Nos. 50-55) Study the following arrangement carefully and answer the question given below. Indian Bank (PO) 2011
F 4 © J 2 E % M P 5 W 9 @ I Q R 6 U H 3 2 7 ★ A T B 8 V #
G $ Y D

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If '1' is subtracted from the 1st digit in each number and '1' is added to the 2nd digit in each number, which will be the 3rd digit of the 2nd highest number?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If the position of the 1st and the 2nd digits within each number are interchanged, which of the following will be the highest number?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: How many such consonants are there in the above arrangement, each of which is immediately preceded by a number but not immediately followed by a number?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Which of the following is the 10th to the right of the 19th from the right end of the above arrangement?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If all the symbols are dropped from the above arrangement, which of the following will be the 14th from the left end?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
What should come in place of the question mark(?) in the following series based on the above arrangement?
JEM 591 RU3 ?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: How many such symbols are there in the above arrangement, each of which is immediately preceded by number and immediately followed by a letter?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Four of the following five are alike in a certain way based on their positions in the above arrangement and so form a group. Which is the one that does not belong to that group?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: From the word 'LAPAROSCOPY', how many independent meaningful English words can be made without changing the order of the letters and using each letter only once?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If in the word 'DISTURBANCE', the first letter is interchanged with the last letter, the second letter is interchanged with the tenth letter and so on, which letter would come after the letter 'T' in the newly formed word?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Number of letters skipped in between adjacent letters in the series is in the order of 1² + 1, 2² + 2, 3² + 3. Which of the following series observes the rule given above?
